zh.lifeSummary: 當Parnall Petronill De Vernon於1383年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，她的父親Ralph de Vernon49歲，母親Margaret Brailsford45歲。她於大約1397年與Sir Hugh Dutton在英國爾哈頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Parnall Petronill De Vernon于1383年出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Vernon49岁，母亲Margaret Brailsford45岁。她于大约1397年与Sir Hugh Dutton在英国爾哈頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Parnall
meanings: A female name corrupted from Petronilla.

nameMeanings.name: Petronill
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

en.lifeSummary: When Parnall Petronill De Vernon was born in 1383, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Vernon, was 49 and her mother, Margaret Brailsford, was 45. She married Sir Hugh Dutton about 1397, in Hatton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1431, in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Parnall Petronill De Vernon est née en 1383, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Vernon, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brailsford, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Dutton environ 1397, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1431, à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Parnall Petronill De Vernon 1383 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Vernon 49 und ihre Mutter Margaret Brailsford 45. Sie hat um 1397 in Hatton, Cheshire, England Sir Hugh Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1431 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Parnall Petronill De Vernon è nata il nel 1383 nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph de Vernon, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Margaret Brailsford, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Dutton circa 1397, nel Hatton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1431, nel Waverton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Waverton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Parnall Petronill De Vernonが1383年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Vernonは49歳，母Margaret Brailsfordは45歳であった。約1397年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンでSir Hugh Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Parnall Petronill De Vernon(이)가 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Vernon(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Brailsford(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1397년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 Sir Hugh Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Parnall Petronill De Vernon nasceu em 1383, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Vernon, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brailsford, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Dutton aproximadamente 1397, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1431, em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Parnall Petronill De Vernon родилась в 1383 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph de Vernon было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brailsford, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Dutton около 1397 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1431 г. в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Parnall Petronill De Vernon nació en 1383, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Vernon, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Margaret Brailsford, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Dutton aproximadamente 1397, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1431, en Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
